text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Yes... I had an exciting dream last night.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
There was a spiral staircase that extended into
the azure sky... and a rippling golden sea
stretched out below...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
And I ran with my friend, as far as our legs would
take us...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I hope I can see those sights again... Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Manhattan Cafe's exciting dream has
left her feeling completely refreshed!
